goal: Implement to-do items with Codex 5.3 until the docs/status non-GA backlog is cleared. Non-GA means open items in docs/status/* excluding GA Blocker §1 (MutationProposal accept/undo). Tranche by tranche: merge handoffs, extend plan for the next scoped slice, keep AGENTS.md status hygiene (strike todos + product-done rows).
summary: Wave 3 (Codex 5.3): useAgent nudge-inbox extract, members popover avatars + shared cache, throttled spinners, microcopy casing sweep, About popover metadata extension, drag keyboard hint.
acceptanceCriteria: Each worker branch merges cleanly; backlog docs reflect closed slices per AGENTS.md
FE workers pass eslint, tsc, CI=true jest, vite build
BE-affecting workers pass pytest + ruff in backend/

tasks.name: useagent-nudge-inbox-extract
tasks.scopedGoal: Close part of release-todo §16b / architecture-todo Theme 3: extract the AC-V14 nudge-inbox state and `reduceNudgeInbox` reducer out of `src/utils/hooks/useAgent.ts` into a dedicated `src/utils/hooks/useNudgeInbox.ts` (or `src/utils/agent/nudgeInbox.ts`). `useAgent` re-exports the existing public surface (`reduceNudgeInbox`, `NUDGE_INBOX_MAX`, `NUDGE_EXPIRY_MS`, `nudges`, `dismissNudge`) so callers and tests do not break.
tasks.brief: Read `.orchestrate/non-ga-todos-2f52/bootstrap/BACKLOG_OPEN_NON_GA.md` Wave-3 row. Goal: shrink useAgent.ts (currently 1010 lines) by lifting nudge-inbox concerns. The reducer is already exported as `reduceNudgeInbox` for unit tests — finish the move. Keep the periodic prune (60s) and 4h expiry semantics. Re-export from `useAgent.ts` for backwards compatibility so `src/__tests__/useAgent.nudgeInbox.test.ts` (or wherever the unit tests live) keep working without churn. Update repo `AGENTS.md` only if the cited line ranges become stale because of this move; do not restate blockers inline. Update docs/status/release-todo.md §16b sub-bullet to reflect partial completion (nudge-inbox lifted; SSE adapter + tool resolver still pending).
acceptance: `reduceNudgeInbox`, `NUDGE_INBOX_MAX`, `NUDGE_EXPIRY_MS`, `dismissNudge`, and `nudges` keep their public behavior end-to-end
useAgent.ts no longer owns the nudge inbox reducer state internally; new module is the source of truth
Existing nudge-inbox unit tests pass without import-path churn beyond targeted updates
eslint + tsc + CI=true jest + vite build pass

tasks.name: members-popover-avatars-cache
tasks.scopedGoal: Address ui-todo §14 + §19 remaining: render member avatars and a count badge inside `MembersPopover`, share the `users/members` React Query so it isn't refetched per popover open, and stop the unconditional refetch on `onOpenChange`.
tasks.brief: Add a `useMembersList()` hook (under `src/utils/hooks/`) that wraps `useReactQuery<IMember[]>('users/members')` with shared key + reasonable staleTime. Migrate `memberPopover`, `board`, `project`, and `taskModal` to consume it. Keep accessibility (focusable trigger, aria-label). Tests should cover the no-refetch-on-open behavior and the rendered count badge / avatar group. Update ui-todo.md §14 + §19 remaining lines once shipped.
acceptance: MembersPopover renders avatars + count and does not re-fetch on every open; cached query hit is the default
All consumers use the shared hook (no duplicate `useReactQuery('users/members')` across components)
ui-todo §14 + §19 remaining row reflects the shipped state
eslint + tsc + CI=true jest + vite build pass

tasks.name: throttled-spinners-hook
tasks.scopedGoal: Address ui-todo Phase 3.5 + 2.A.7: introduce `useDelayedFlag(active, delayMs)` (default 250ms) and apply it to the spinner / loading affordances on `AiTaskAssistPanel`, `AiChatDrawer`, and `BoardBriefDrawer` so fast local-engine responses don't flash a spinner.
tasks.brief: Create `src/utils/hooks/useDelayedFlag.ts` with thorough JSDoc + tests. Wrap visible spinner branches in those AI surfaces with the hook so the spinner only renders after 250ms of sustained loading. Do not change the underlying loading state or analytics. Update ui-todo.md to strike the throttled-spinner items.
acceptance: `useDelayedFlag` exported with unit tests covering immediate-clear and delayed-on transitions
Three AI surfaces (assist panel, chat drawer, brief drawer) wrap their spinner with the hook
ui-todo Phase 3.5 / 2.A.7 throttled-spinner reference reflects shipped state
eslint + tsc + CI=true jest + vite build pass

tasks.name: microcopy-casing-sweep
tasks.scopedGoal: Address ui-todo Phase 3.1 microcopy / casing standardization: sweep `src/i18n/locales/en.ts` and `src/i18n/locales/zh-CN.ts` plus `src/constants/microcopy.ts` so user-facing button copy uses sentence case and consistent verbs (e.g. `Login` → `Log in`, `Register` → `Sign up`, `Create Project` → `Create project`, `Submit` → `Save`). Do not add new translation keys; rephrase existing values only.
tasks.brief: Mechanical pass on existing keys. Keep zh-CN parity (Chinese values may be unchanged where casing doesn't apply, but if the English string changes meaning the Chinese should follow). Skip strings that are i18n-correct already. Update ui-todo §17 + Phase 3.1 lines with the resolution. Verify FE tests still pass — many tests assert on visible labels.
acceptance: No new translation keys added; only values updated for casing / verb consistency
Tests that rely on labels updated to the new strings (no test removed without replacement)
ui-todo §17 / Phase 3.1 row updated to reflect the sweep
eslint + tsc + CI=true jest + vite build pass

tasks.name: agent-metadata-recursion-tags-about
tasks.scopedGoal: Extend release-todo §14 closeout: surface additional `AgentMetadata` fields (`recursion_limit`, `tags`, optionally `context_schema` shape) for `chat-agent` inside `CopilotAboutPopover`, alongside the existing rate-limit + autonomy disclosure. Keep remote-only gating and graceful empty states.
tasks.brief: Reuse the session-cached `getAgentMetadata` flow that today renders `rate_limit` / `allowed_autonomy`. Add additional rows or chips for `recursion_limit` (single integer line) and `tags` (chip list) when present. Skip entirely when `aiUseLocalEngine` is true or the AI base URL is empty. Add or extend tests near `aiAccessibility.strict.test.tsx` / `copilotAboutPopover` test files. Update release-todo §14 partial line with new shipped fields.
acceptance: `recursion_limit` and `tags` (when provided) render in `CopilotAboutPopover` for `chat-agent` with safe empty states
Local-engine / empty-base-URL paths render no metadata rows
Tests assert presence of new disclosures and absence under local-engine gating
eslint + tsc + CI=true jest + vite build pass

tasks.name: drag-keyboard-affordance-hint
tasks.scopedGoal: Address ui-todo Phase 3.4 / WCAG 2.5.7: surface a non-mouse drag affordance — add a tooltip or `aria-keyshortcuts` hint on task cards documenting `Space` to lift, arrows to move, `Space` to drop, `Esc` to cancel. Keyboard sensor in `@hello-pangea/dnd` already supports this; this slice is about discoverability.
tasks.brief: Smallest viable change: add an AntD `Tooltip` (or `title` + `aria-keyshortcuts`) on the task-card button advertising the keyboard drag controls. Use existing microcopy keys or add minimal new entries (e.g. `microcopy.dragHints.taskCardKeyboard`) with zh-CN parity. Avoid regressions to the column drag click target. Update ui-todo Phase 3.4 / 2.A.9 references when shipped.
acceptance: Task cards expose a discoverable keyboard-drag affordance (tooltip or `aria-keyshortcuts`) with i18n parity
Existing column tests still pass; a new test asserts the hint text or aria attribute
ui-todo Phase 3.4 row updated to reflect keyboard-affordance hint
eslint + tsc + CI=true jest + vite build pass
